creator: buganini@gmail.com
text:
I don't know why it crash on HEAD, my laptop is also running
8-CURRENT, "Sat May 16 21:25:14 CST 2009",
I'm making buildworld to make it up-to-date.

for amd64 I've used uintptr_t for data being converted between integer/pointer,
but I'm not sure if this could solve all problem.

here is patch
http://security-hole.info/~buganini/ports/bsdconv.patch
or full shar
http://security-hole.info/~buganini/ports/bsdconv.shar

thanks
